SECONDDRAW-GUT_SPILL.title: Gut Spill
SECONDDRAW-GUT_SPILL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
Enemy loses {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.

SECONDDRAW-BLACK_DEATH.title: Black Death
SECONDDRAW-BLACK_DEATH.description:

Double this card's [gold]Poison[/gold] and increase its cost by 1.
SECONDDRAW-GALACTIC_ALGORITHM.title: Galactic Algorithm
SECONDDRAW-GALACTIC_ALGORITHM.descriptio:
[gold]Channel[/gold] {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} random Orbs.
Double X if it is prime.
